Summarize in one sentence: Riverdale installed flood sensors along the north bank, trained emergency volunteers, and will test sirens next Friday before the rainy season.
Summarize in exactly two bullets: The library extended evening hours, added a makerspace with 3D printers, and created weekend coding workshops for teens.

Debug this Python code and provide the corrected code: def max_value(items):
    best = items[0]
    for item in items:
        return best
It should return the largest item.

Correct this Python code that uses a mutable default: def add_tag(tag, tags=[]):
    tags.append(tag)
    return tags

Debug this late-binding Python code: funcs=[]
for i in range(3):
    funcs.append(lambda: i)
Each lambda should return its own i.

Fix this generator exhaustion bug: nums = (n for n in [1, 2, 3])
first = sum(nums)
second = sum(nums)
Both sums should be 6.
